---
title: "About"
format: html
---

About this site


```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true

library(shiny)

ui <- fluidPage(
  sliderInput("n", "Number of points", 100, 1000, 500),
  plotOutput("plot")
)

server <- function(input, output) {
  output$plot <- renderPlot({
    plot(
      rnorm(input$n),
      rnorm(input$n),
      pch = 19,
      col = "steelblue"
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
